{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Silver Step
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Silver Step]] is an [[Enforcer technique]] with [[Striker]] elements.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17">''Blackflame'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Silver Step]] is a technique that launches the user.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
